title: Tender Manager
description:
Job Summary

Lead and manage the end-to-end tender process for mechanical, electrical, and ELV systems, driving technical compliance, risk mitigation, and timely submissions to secure project wins and support business growth.

Responsibilities

  • Analyze RFQs and tender opportunities by reviewing documents, clarifying technical and commercial details, and raising queries with clients and consultants to ensure accurate scope definition
  • Develop and maintain Risk Management checklists and tender cost summaries to support margin approval and win-price strategy decisions
  • Conduct site rounds and prepare detailed meeting minutes to capture critical information and align tender scope with project requirements
  • Lead tender submissions for mechanical, electrical, and ELV systems by coordinating cross-functional teams to ensure technical compliance, risk mitigation, and on-time delivery
  • Collaborate with project teams during the tender stage to plan manpower and establish project setup for seamless execution post-award
  • Prepare and deliver weekly tender reports and support management presentations to inform strategic decision-making
  • Facilitate smooth handover of tender documentation and requirements to project teams following contract award

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience in electrical trade with knowledge of HT, LV, and ELV systems, as well as familiarity with ACMV and fire protection systems
  • Exposure to large-scale projects to navigate complex tender requirements effectively
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Word, Excel, and PowerPoint to create professional presentations and reports
  • Strong communication skills demonstrated by confident and persuasive participation in tender interviews

For interested applicants, please click "Quick Apply”

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified.

By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal information to prospective employers for their consideration.

Yvette Manalo | EA Reg No: R1659970

JTE Recruit Pte Ltd | EA Lic No: 14C7215
